products.name: RDX Boxing Gloves Blue 10oz
products.description: Professional boxing gloves from RDX. Excellent wrist support, triple-layer foam padding. Perfect for training and sparring. Available in sizes 8oz, 10oz, 12oz, 14oz.

products.name: Everlast Pro Style Boxing Gloves 12oz
products.description: Classic Everlast Pro Style boxing gloves. Durable synthetic leather, pre-curved thumb design. Great for bag work and sparring. Sizes: 10oz, 12oz, 14oz, 16oz.

products.name: Fairtex BGV1 Muay Thai Boxing Gloves
products.description: Premium Fairtex BGV1 Muay Thai boxing gloves. Genuine leather construction, contoured hook-and-loop closure. Used by professional fighters worldwide. Sizes: 10oz–16oz.

products.name: Venum Challenger MMA Gloves
products.description: Venum Challenger MMA gloves for training and competition. Premium Skintex leather, attached thumb, full palm open design. Sizes: S/M and L/XL.

products.name: RDX MMA Sparring Gloves Pro
products.description: RDX MMA Pro Series sparring gloves. 7oz weight, durable Maya hide leather, gel padding. Open palm design for grappling. Sizes: S/M, L/XL.

products.name: Adidas ADISTAR Kopfschutz Headguard
products.description: Adidas ADISTAR competition headguard. Meets AIBA regulations. Lightweight design with wide vision cutout. Available in S/M and L/XL.

products.name: Venum Elite Kopfschutz Headguard
products.description: Venum Elite boxing headguard. Triple-density foam, adjustable rear strap and chin strap. Full coverage protection. Sizes: S/M and L/XL.

products.name: RDX Heavy Boxing Bag 4ft
products.description: RDX 4ft punching bag. Maya hide leather shell, triple-layer foam fill. Includes hanging chains and swivel. Weight approx. 30kg. Ideal for boxing, kickboxing, Muay Thai.

products.name: Hayabusa T3 Kickboxing Shin Guards
products.description: Hayabusa T3 shin guards for kickboxing and Muay Thai. Dual cross-strap closure, anatomical shaping. Full shin and instep coverage. Sizes: S, M, L, XL.

products.name: Venum Karate Gi White 8oz
products.description: Venum Elite Karate Gi. 8oz cotton-polyester blend, elastic waistband pants, reinforced stitching. Available in sizes 140cm–200cm. WKF approved for competition.

products.name: RDX Zahnschutz Mundschutz Mouthguard
products.description: RDX boil-and-bite mouthguard. Absorbs up to 60% of impact. Includes protective case. Fits most mouth sizes. Available in multiple colours.

products.name: Everlast Boxhandschuhe BlauRot 10oz
products.description: Everlast Boxhandschuhe Klassik Serie. Blaues und rotes Design. Synthetisches Leder, C3 Foam Polsterung. Ideal für Sparring und Taschentraining. Größen: 10oz, 12oz.
